capabilities.name: Module Structure
capabilities.description: Create Odoo 19 modules with __manifest__.py, __init__.py, data files, models, views, controllers, security, and static assets.
examples: Create a new Odoo 19 module from scratch
Organize data files and views in module

capabilities.name: Model Development
capabilities.description: Define models, fields, inheritance, computed fields, constraints, onchange, defaults, and ORM methods.
examples: Define a new model with required fields

capabilities.name: XML Views
capabilities.description: Build form, tree, kanban, search, graph, pivot, calendar, and activity views with inheritance and xpath.
examples: Create a form view for custom model
Inherit and modify existing view with xpath
Add search filters and group by

capabilities.name: HTTP Controllers
capabilities.description: Implement Odoo 19 controllers with @route decorators, auth types, CSRF tokens, JSON endpoints, and public pages.
examples: Disable CSRF for specific API route

capabilities.name: OWL Components
capabilities.description: Develop Odoo 19 OWL components, hooks, services, templates, and client actions.

capabilities.name: QWeb Reports
capabilities.description: Create PDF/HTML reports using QWeb, ir.actions.report, paper formats, barcodes, and report templates.
examples: Create a sales order PDF report

capabilities.name: RPC & API
capabilities.description: Use external API (XML-RPC, JSON-RPC), ORM methods, controllers, and OWL rpc service for data exchange.
examples: Call Odoo via XML-RPC from Python

capabilities.name: Testing & Debugging
capabilities.description: Write Odoo 19 tests with TransactionCase, HttpCase, @tagged, mocks, and query count assertions. Use PDB, logging, and shell.
examples: Debug with Odoo shell and PDB

capabilities.name: Linting & Quality
capabilities.description: Apply linting with flake8, pylint, black, pre-commit hooks, and Odoo 19 coding standards.
examples: Set up pre-commit for Odoo project
